rows.label: tev023201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Rosie about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Rosie if she's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0001
rows.name:
My team is researching issues
related to NLA's sustainability—particularly
concerning water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Using this purification plant to process
wastewater and rainwater for reuse would
be solution enough, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Nevertheless, Ajoa's gotten it into her head that
there's some big shortage looming, and the only
solution is to use water from outside the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0004
rows.name:
You know the only reason for that is because
Ian is handsome and she wants to work together
with him at the lake. Ugh! So unprofessional![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Some nutty lady has been pestering
people at the cathedral recently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0009
rows.name:
She's going around claiming that
some god called the "Bringer of
Miracles" led NLA to crash on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Begging the obvious question: Where was
Mr. Miracles when the xenoforms attacked
us in the first goddamn place?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ugh. I try to pray at church every day, but
now I totally dread it because I know this
batcrap-crazy lady is going to hassle me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Rosie about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Rosie about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0012
rows.name:
As the population expands and production
increases, the water shortages my team
anticipated have totally materialized.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0013
rows.name:
But there's no need to worry—the Biahno
water- purification plant that we built
has stabilized our water supply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0014
rows.name:
It wasn't a plan that I supported at
first, but I've come around now that I
see how much good it's doing for the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Ajoa and Ian have transferred to the
Biahno water- purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0020
rows.name:
...What, me? Oh, hell no. I wouldn't
be caught dead over there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0021
rows.name:
The whole area is still crawling
with indigens, right? What fool
would want to be stationed there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0022
rows.name:
That's why I had no complaints
when Ian assigned me to manage
the NLA office instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Even though I suspect he did it so that
those two lovebirds wouldn't have me interrupting
them at their little lakeside retreat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_SEL2011
rows.name:
Ask Rosie about the effects
of xenoforms moving to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Rosie about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0024
rows.name:
The growing xenoform population
has had a major impact on NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0025
rows.name:
We don't want them on the public dole,
so that means giving them jobs in order
for them to become self-reliant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0026
rows.name:
It also forces us to increase our
production of food and potable water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0027
rows.name:
Oh, and they need places to live as well. And
yeah, we have that big Ma-non ship, but we
can't have them living like refugees forever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0028
rows.name:
So I don't have time to sit around
licking my wounds. I have to get out
there and do what I can for them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0031
rows.name:
With my friends gone, there's
no one left to manage the Biahno
water-purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0032
rows.name:
After that...incident, I was hoping we could run
some kind of automated maintenance routine at the
plant so no one had to go there anymore...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0033
rows.name:
But that's a pipe dream, because a
lot of the plant's maintenance can
only be performed by human hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0034
rows.name:
That means I'm going to have to
be the one to head out there—and
that scares the heck out of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Rosie about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0035
rows.name:
The Orphe have created autosentries for
the Biahno water-purification plant![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Oh, you helped them with that?
Wow! You really ARE the [ST:gender p1=hero p2=heroine ] of NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0037
rows.name:
Well, thanks to you, it sounds
like we no longer need to worry
about indigen attacks there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0038
rows.name:
Then I've got no excuse. For the good of
NLA— and to make sure my colleagues'
sacrifice was not in vain—I'm going to go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_SEL4011
rows.name: Ask Rosie about her colleagues.

rows.label: tev023201_SEL4021
rows.name: Ask Rosie about recent developments.

rows.label: tev023201_SEL4031
rows.name: Ask Rosie about her colleagues.

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0039
rows.name:
I just heard from Ajoa! She says she's
finally up and moving around again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0040
rows.name:
She even told me a little
about what happened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0041
rows.name:
Apparently a cantor laid eggs inside of
her in order to take advantage of the
organic components of her Blue Blood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0042
rows.name:
...Oh my god, I can't even imagine it.
They really are aliens, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0043
rows.name:
Well, I'd better get to work. I don't
want Ajoa to be disappointed in me
when she makes it back over here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0046
rows.name:
Having Tan'celeg around has been a huge
help. Now when I have technical issues,
I can bring them straight to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0047
rows.name:
The only problem is that whenever I'm just
grumbling about something, he takes it
seriously and proposes some rational solution.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0048
rows.name:
He's so serious! It's like talking to a
man who just doesn't listen, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0049
rows.name:
But, uh...keep that between you and
me, okay? As a work partner, he's
fantastic. I'd hate to lose him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0058
rows.name:
I heard back from the team of
analysts who were investigating
what...used to be Ajoa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0059
rows.name:
Apparently a cantor laid eggs inside of
her in order to take advantage of the
organic components of her Blue Blood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0060
rows.name:
...Oh my god, I can't even imagine it.
They really are aliens, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0061
rows.name: It must have been so horrible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023201_MSG0062
rows.name:
Anyway, from this day forth, I've
decided to take good care of this
place...just like Ajoa and Ian would have.[ST:wait ]
